name: MessengerX.io
tagline: Send chatbot messages and manage user tags
description: Send on-demand chatbot responses, attach personalization tags to users, and retrieve active tags through the MessengerX/Machaao messaging API.

auth.hint: Create a MessengerX application and send its API token in the api_token header. Store only the token value in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send an on-demand text or structured message to one or more MessengerX user identifiers.

params.name: users
params.description: MessengerX user identifiers that should receive the response.

params.name: message
params.description: Message object containing text, attachment, quick replies, buttons, or supported combinations.

tools.name: tag_user
tools.description: Add, update, or disable a personalization tag for a MessengerX user.

params.name: status
params.description: Use 1 to activate the tag or 0 to remove/deactivate it.

tools.name: get_user_tags
tools.description: Retrieve all active personalization tags for one MessengerX user.
